form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Jumped at a huge quote at debut, settled towards the rear 2nd of 14 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1300m, 0.8 len behind Power And The Beat carrying 59kg at $71. Nice debut, have to respect this time.

form.formComment: Resuming off four months break after having had one race start. At debut last start got back early 5th of 10 at Geelong 3yo Mdn-Sw on December 12 over 1530m, 4 len behind Storm Leopard with 58kg at $20. Had six recent trials to get fit for this. Last trial won a jump-out at Ballarat on March 12. Prefer to see this one but watch betting.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 2nd of 9 at Geelong 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1212m, nose behind Wild Roses Grow with 54kg at $1.75. Last start gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 7 at Geelong 3yo F Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Farakta with 57kg at $1.80. Sets up perfectly and can break through.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 4th of 7 at Geelong 3yo F Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1200m, 2 len behind Farakta with 57kg at $9. form.formComment: Second-up. Promising on debut held ground to the line 2nd of 11 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on November 7 over 1200m, in the wet; 0.5 len behind Motorsports carrying 56kg at $11. Returned from break 3rd of 14 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1300m, 1.2 len behind Power And The Beat with 57kg at $1.50. Can improve and profiles very well.

form.formComment: First starter by The Autumn Sun out of See You Soon purchased for AUD $ 200,000 (Inglis 2024 Australian Easter Yearling Sale). Has a total of four trials leading in today's debut. Betting is the best pointer to her chances.
